videos.title: Place Value up to 5 Digits | Ten Thousands Place
videos.description: Learn about place value in 5-digit numbers. Understand ones, tens, hundreds, thousands, and ten thousands places with real-life examples like distances and populations!
learningObjectives: Identify the five places in a 5-digit number
State the value of each digit based on its position
Read a 5-digit number using place value
keyConceptsCovered: Ones, tens, hundreds, thousands, ten thousands
How each place is 10 times the one before it

videos.title: Place Value Practice | All Forms of 5-Digit Numbers
videos.description: Practice writing 5-digit numbers in standard form, expanded form, and word form. Strengthen your understanding of place value with plenty of examples and exercises.
learningObjectives: Convert between standard and expanded forms
keyConceptsCovered: Word form (e.g., forty-five thousand three hundred twenty-eight)

videos.title: 3-Digit Place Value Review
videos.description: Review place value for 3-digit numbers. Understand the ones, tens, and hundreds places and how each digit's position determines its value.
learningObjectives: Identify the ones, tens, and hundreds place in a 3-digit number
State the value of each digit based on its position
keyConceptsCovered: Foundation for understanding larger place values

videos.title: Counting to 1000
videos.description: Learn to count up to 1000 by ones, tens, and hundreds. Understand what happens after 999 and how we build larger numbers from smaller groups.
learningObjectives: Bridge the transition from hundreds to thousands

excellent_performance.description: For students who scored >= 90% on readiness
excellent_performance.rationale: Quick introduction and practice for strong students

ready_performance.description: For students who scored 80-89% on readiness
ready_performance.rationale: Complete coverage of place value with review

partial_readiness.description: For students who scored 50-79% on readiness
partial_readiness.rationale: Start with prerequisite review, then cover 5-digit place value

after_prerequisite_review.description: For students who scored < 50% but completed prerequisites

questions.question: In the number 53,417, what is the value of the digit 5?
questions.explanation: The digit 5 is in the ten thousands place. So its value is 50,000.

usageNotes.teacherGuidance: Use a place value chart with columns for ten thousands, thousands, hundreds, tens, and ones. Have students place digits and say the value of each digit aloud.
usageNotes.parentGuidance: Help your child find 5-digit numbers in real life: car odometer readings, populations on maps, prices of electronics. Talk about what each digit means.
usageNotes.studentGuidance: Think of place value like an address. Each digit lives in a different house: ones, tens, hundreds, thousands, ten thousands. The house tells you how much the digit is worth!
